reason: Backend guideline index for apply-preview quality checks.
Verify confirmation, stale baseline, and missing artifact failures leave state unchanged.
Verify schema, snapshot-first write, tests, and forbidden patterns.
Verify successful apply-preview logs summary only.
Verify filesystem persistence and metadata/snapshot behavior.
Verify durable apply-preview contract is documented consistently.
Verify existing preview/diff/write helpers were reused.
Verify apply-preview scope matches Phase 1 roadmap.
Verify hardening loop evidence and boundaries.
